artifact.description: Fine-tuned vision transformer for pneumonia detection in chest X-rays, achieving 97.3% sensitivity on institutional validation set

ai_assistance.description: Assisted with hyperparameter search analysis and training pipeline debugging

review.notes: Model approved for clinical decision support (not standalone diagnosis). Must be used alongside radiologist interpretation per institutional policy.

governance.policy: FDA Software as Medical Device (SaMD) Guidance
Institutional AI in Clinical Practice Policy
